boards: Advisory Board, University of Zurich Business Ethics Institute

rapport_triggers: Acquired a work by a young Zurich-based sculptor at the Kunsthaus Zurich auction on 2024-09-16.
Delivered a keynote titled 'Supply Chain Integrity as a Competitive Moat' at the Zurich Governance Forum on 2025-05-14.
Announced the opening of the 38th Ammann Retail Group store in Lausanne on 2024-01-24.
redline_signals: Publicly states that companies must publish full supply chain maps, calling non‑disclosure "hiding something" (2025-05-14 tweet).
Advocates for mandatory labor and waste audits of tier‑2 packaging suppliers, emphasizing ESG compliance (2023-06-19 tweet).
Criticizes quarterly earnings focus, calling it a myth in a 2023 reading post.
